_meta.purpose: AI literacy + safety + ethics curriculum module
_meta.notes: Designed for middle-school to early high-school learners

_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder

title: AI Safety & Regulations
subtitle: using AI responsibly, safely, and ethically
overview: This session introduces students to AI safety, responsible usage, and global regulations. Students learn how AI systems can impact society, why rules are needed, and how to use AI tools ethically, safely, and responsibly.
learningOutcomes: Learn basic concepts of AI ethics
Apply safe practices when using AI tools

flow: Why AI needs rules and regulations
Bias and fairness in AI systems

images._note: Use real-world illustrations: ethics, safety, cybersecurity, privacy concepts, and responsible AI usage.

gallery.caption: Balancing innovation with responsibility in AI systems
Protecting user data and privacy in digital systems
AI systems can sometimes reflect human bias
Different countries are creating AI regulations
Using AI tools responsibly and ethically

realWorldExamples.title: AI Chatbot Misuse
realWorldExamples.desc: Chatbots can generate incorrect or harmful information if not regulated properly.

realWorldExamples.title: Facial Recognition Concerns
realWorldExamples.desc: Privacy and bias concerns arise when AI identifies people without consent.

realWorldExamples.title: Deepfake Technology
realWorldExamples.desc: AI-generated fake videos can spread misinformation if misused.

safePractices: Do not share personal or sensitive information with AI tools
Use AI tools under guidance when possible

youtubeVideos.title: What is AI Ethics?
youtubeVideos.desc: Introduction to ethical AI systems and responsible use.

youtubeVideos.title: AI Bias Explained
youtubeVideos.desc: Understanding how bias appears in AI systems.

youtubeVideos.title: Why AI Regulation Matters
youtubeVideos.desc: Global efforts to regulate artificial intelligence.

youtubeVideos.title: Deepfakes and Digital Safety
youtubeVideos.desc: How deepfakes work and why awareness is important.

activity.title: AI Safety Scenario Workshop
activity.objective: Learn how to identify safe and unsafe AI usage situations
steps: Identify possible risks in each scenario
activity.output: AI Safety awareness poster + discussion presentation

quiz.q: What is AI safety mainly about?
What should you NOT do with AI tools?
